revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月初六]][[zh:正月初六]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 6|qq=January 6}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}} the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . == Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|en|Empress Kōgyoku|qid=Q235296|lt=Empress Saimei|1=Empress Kōgyoku}} 7 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|661|en|661|qid=Q30084|lt=661|1=661}}th year {{ill|February 13|en|February 13|qid=Q2333|lt=February 13|1=February 13}} ) - Empress Saimei departs from Naniwa to aid [[:en:Baekje|Baekje]] .{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}}
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1143910|lt=Kōji|1=Kōji (Muromachi period)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1556|en|1556|qid=Q6590|lt=1556|1=1556}}th year {{ill|February 16|en|February 16|qid=Q2342|lt=February 16|1=February 16}} ) - {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|en|Tōdō Takatora|qid=Q1377984|lt=Tōdō Takatora|1=Tōdō Takatora}} , samurai (* {{ill|1630|en|1630|qid=Q6856|lt=1630|1=1630}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 12 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1829|en|1829|qid=Q7572|lt=1829|1=1829}}th year {{ill|February 9|en|February 9|qid=Q2324|lt=February 9|1=February 9}} ) - {{ill|Kanagaki Robun|en|Kanagaki Robun|qid=Q1723541|lt=Kanagaki Robun|1=Kanagaki Robun}} , playwright (* {{ill|1894|en|1894|qid=Q7843|lt=1894|1=1894}} ). * ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1920|en|1920|qid=Q2155|lt=1920|1=1920}}th year {{ill|February 25|en|February 25|qid=Q2356|lt=February 25|1=February 25}} ) - {{ill|Sun Myung Moon|en|Sun Myung Moon|qid=Q296734|lt=Sun Myung Moon|1=Sun Myung Moon}} , religious leader (* {{ill|2012|en|2012|qid=Q1990|lt=2012|1=2012}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|qid=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|757|en|757|qid=Q409717|lt=757|1=757}}th year {{ill|January 30|en|January 30|qid=Q2287|lt=January 30|1=January 30}} ) - {{ill|Tachibana no Moroe|en|Tachibana no Moroe|qid=Q3135863|lt=Tachibana no Moroe|1=Tachibana no Moroe}} , court noble, poet (* {{ill|684|en|684|qid=Q31128|lt=684|1=684}} ). * {{ill|Kempo (era)|en|Kempo (era)|qid=Q1194251|lt=Kenpō (era)|1=Kempo (era)}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1215|en|1215|qid=Q5366|lt=1215|1=1215}}th year {{ill|February 6|en|February 6|qid=Q2320|lt=February 6|1=February 6}} ) - {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|en|Hōjō Tokimasa|qid=Q589811|lt=Hōjō Tokimasa|1=Hōjō Tokimasa}} , first {{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|qid=Q1045904|lt=Shikken|1=Shikken}} (regent) of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (* {{ill|1138|en|1138|qid=Q19606|lt=1138|1=1138}} ).
* {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 5 (intercalary January) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1822|en|1822|qid=Q6983|lt=1822|1=1822}}th year {{ill|February 27|en|February 27|qid=Q2361|lt=February 27|1=February 27}} ) - {{ill|Shikitei Sanba|en|Shikitei Sanba|qid=Q1032912|lt=Shikitei Sanba|1=Shikitei Sanba}} , satirical writer (* {{ill|1796|en|1796|qid=Q7818|lt=1796|1=1796}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1831|en|1831|qid=Q7579|lt=1831|1=1831}}th year {{ill|February 18|en|February 18|qid=Q2343|lt=February 18|1=February 18}} ) - {{ill|Ryōkan|en|Ryōkan|qid=Q5338269|lt=Ryōkan|1=Ryōkan}} , Buddhist monk (* {{ill|1758|en|1758|qid=Q7639|lt=1758|1=1758}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaiei|1=Kaei}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1850|en|1850|qid=Q7653|lt=1850|1=1850}}th year {{ill|February 17|en|February 17|qid=Q2341|lt=February 17|1=February 17}} ) - {{ill|Satō Nobuhiro|en|Satō Nobuhiro|qid=Q5368242|lt=Satō Nobuhiro|1=Satō Nobuhiro}} , economic theorist (* {{ill|1769|en|1769|qid=Q7679|lt=1769|1=1769}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Rokunichi Toshikoshi|ja|六日年越し|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokunichi Toshikoshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|5|1|7|12|6|2|1|0106|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
